metadata.description: CLI tools for Claude Code — Twitter, Google Workspace, Image Generation

plugins.name: x-cli
plugins.description: Post tweets and manage X/Twitter interactions from Claude Code

plugins.name: google-cli
plugins.description: Google Workspace CLI (Drive, Docs, Sheets) for Claude Code

plugins.name: gemini-image
plugins.description: Generate and edit images using Gemini 2.5 Flash from Claude Code

plugins.name: pm-agent
plugins.description: Conversational problem management. Capture, decorate, and organize problems with guided workflows.

plugins.name: claude-config-lint
plugins.description: Deterministic Zod-based schema validator for Claude Code config files.

plugins.name: create-dev-start
plugins.description: Generates a project-specific dev-start skill for onboarding new developers

plugins.name: worktree-tickets
plugins.description: Per-ticket git worktrees + parallel teammates. Spawn isolated ticket workers without blocking the main session.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Spawn a long-lived builder teammate so the orchestrator keeps a clean context during multi-round design + implementation work.

plugins.name: git-clean-stop
plugins.description: Enforces a clean git status before Claude can stop. Uncommitted changes must be committed or ignored.

plugins.name: plugin-version-guard
plugins.description: Scaffolds a git pre-commit hook that blocks commits when plugin code changes without a version bump.
